notes:
Now this works thanks protontricks. Follow the instructions:

1. Launch the game once, the game will open the launcher, but wont launch

2. Install protontricks from: https://github.com/Sirmentio/protontricks, make sure to install the dependencies including winetricks

3. Open the terminal and type "protontricks 527280 dotnet40" without quotes

4. Install DotNet40 as it was windows

5. Just wait until it finishes and ignore all the warning and error stuff messages from the terminal

6. Launch the game and the launcher will now open the game

7. Enjoy

BTW the game runs flawlessly with no bugs or slowdowns
title: Nights of Azure
